query: SELECT id, level, category, message, SUBSTRING(context, 1, 200) as ctx FROM systemLogs WHERE category IN ('SIM', 'SCAN', 'SYSTEM') ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2fRMU9WuDe4UzGh.6d94b4c6929d --database MmWmJbH77mYYXTZazVYpbM --execute SELECT id, level, category, message, SUBSTRING(context, 1, 200) as ctx FROM systemLogs WHERE category IN ('SIM', 'SCAN', 'SYSTEM') ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20;
